lines.speaker: Mom
lines.content: I think our daughter is spending too much time on her tablet. We need to set some limits.
lines.cn: 我觉得女儿在平板电脑上花太多时间了。我们得设一些限制。

lines.speaker: Dad
lines.content: I agree. How about one hour on weekdays and two hours on weekends? That seems fair.
lines.cn: 我同意。工作日一小时，周末两小时怎么样？听起来比较公平。

lines.speaker: Mom
lines.content: That sounds good. But we also need to offer other activities. Maybe she can join a sports class?
lines.cn: 听起来不错。但我们也得提供其他活动。也许她可以参加体育班？

lines.speaker: Dad
lines.content: She mentioned wanting to try swimming. There is a community pool nearby with lessons for kids.
lines.cn: 她提到过想学游泳。附近有个社区游泳池，有儿童课程。

lines.speaker: Mom
lines.content: Perfect. It is good for her health and she will make new friends too. What about homework?
lines.cn: 完美。对她的健康有好处，她还能交到新朋友。那作业呢？

lines.speaker: Dad
lines.content: We should help her build a routine. Homework first, then playtime. Consistency is key.
lines.cn: 我们应该帮她建立规律。先做作业，再玩。一致性是关键。

lines.speaker: Mom
lines.content: You are right. Also, let us read to her every night before bed. It helps with language skills.
lines.cn: 你说得对。还有，我们每晚睡前给她读书吧。这对语言能力有帮助。

lines.speaker: Dad
lines.content: I love reading bedtime stories. It is my favorite part of the day. We are doing okay, are not we?
lines.cn: 我喜欢读睡前故事。这是我最喜欢的一刻。我们做得还不错，对吧？

lines.speaker: Mom
lines.content: We are doing great. Parenting is hard, but we are a good team. I am proud of us.
lines.cn: 我们做得很好。育儿不容易，但我们是个好团队。我为我们骄傲。

lines.speaker: Dad
lines.content: Me too. Let us keep supporting each other and doing our best for our kids.
lines.cn: 我也是。让我们继续互相支持，为孩子做到最好。
